name: House of Wander
tagline: Guided stays, entered like small worlds.
voice: Direct about what is prototype and what is real

bookingPosition.now: Airbnb remains the trusted booking handoff.
bookingPosition.next: Amigo can guide guests through questions and readiness before the Airbnb handoff.
bookingPosition.later: Direct booking can become independent once availability, payments, rules, host messaging, and support are approved.
